title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Donate the Following Equipment: 1 Unit 16 Liters Metallic Knapsack Sprayer; 1 Unit 100 Kg. Platform Balance, Mechanical; 1 Unit Multi-purpose Shredder with 7hp Diesel Engine, 2,300 Kls / Hr. to Barangay Bambang to Be Used in Its Barangay Material Recovery Facility. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 12/21/2020)
